text: Artificial intelligence, or AI, is the ability of machines to perform tasks that usually require human intelligence. This includes learning, reasoning, and problem-solving. A key part of AI is machine learning, where computers learn from data without being explicitly programmed. Deep learning is a more advanced type of machine learning that uses complex networks to analyze information, similar to the human brain. Today, AI is used in many daily life applications, such as voice assistants on smartphones, recommendation systems on streaming platforms, and smart home devices. These technologies help us work, communicate, and make decisions more efficiently.
